title: [FYI] Building on Raspberry PI-1 running Devuan-1.0
body:
```
kernel/driver.o: In function `__gnu_cxx::__exchange_and_add(int volatile*, int)': 
/usr/bin/../lib/gcc/arm-linux-gnueabi/4.9/../../../../include/c++/4.9/ext/atomicity.h:49: undefined reference to `__atomic_fetch_add_4' 
/usr/bin/../lib/gcc/arm-linux-gnueabi/4.9/../../../../include/c++/4.9/ext/atomicity.h:49: undefined reference to `__atomic_fetch_add_4' 
backends/smv/smv.o: In function `__gnu_cxx::__atomic_add(int volatile*, int)':
/usr/bin/../lib/gcc/arm-linux-gnueabi/4.9/../../../../include/c++/4.9/ext/atomicity.h:53: undefined reference to `__atomic_fetch_add_4'
/usr/bin/../lib/gcc/arm-linux-gnueabi/4.9/../../../../include/c++/4.9/ext/atomicity.h:53: undefined reference to `__atomic_fetch_add_4'
clang: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
Makefile:401: recipe for target 'yosys' failed
make: *** [yosys] Error 1
```
In `yosys`'s `Makefile` add `-latomic` to the line...
```
LDLIBS := $(LDLIBS) -lstdc++ -lm
```
----
Added 20171118-2327-GMT:
```
export LDFLAGS=-latomic
make PREFIX=$YourPREFIX
```
This does not need changing a file, so makes a future `git pull` easier.
